{{CargoRelic
|name=Omphalos
|class_id=22043
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=01-08
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.07%), Wishing (0.03%)
|description=On Jan 8, 450 BC, the ancient Greeks established this stone tool on the coast of the Mediterranean Sea.<br>The Omphalos stone tool was a circular stone tool created by the ancient Greeks to symbolize the navel of the earth, based on their belief in the god Zeus. The word "Omphalos" means "navel" in Greek. It is said that Zeus once released two eagles, one flew to the east and the other to the west, and finally they converged at one place, which was the center of the earth.This stone tool was created by people to commemorate this legend.
|fame=26
|art=33
|fth=44
|civ=22
|tech=29
|ss1=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail HP +30<br>Quarry LVL: 90/90
|ss2=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail HP +60<br>Quarry LVL: 90/90
|ss3=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail HP +90<br>Quarry LVL: 90/90
|ss4=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail HP +150<br>Quarry LVL: 90/90
|ss7=Per 5 Quarry LVLs, Snail HP +150<br>Quarry LVL: 90/90<br>Snail HP +500 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Quary skill I.png|50px]]Place in Quarry: This Relic's FTH +5
}}
